issues.description: Condition requires both [Satori] AND [Hotori] on board, but DSL only checks for Satori. Should be a composite condition checking both cards.
Target should allow choosing 0 or 1 character ("up to 1"), but current scope doesn't reflect optionality. Target needs optional/upTo modifier.
DSL lacks cost encoding (DON!! −2, rest this Character). Should include cost metadata or separate cost actions.
